title: And one more thing ...
content:
Steve Jobs just announced ...

!-/gallery/misc/imac_new.png!

The new "iMac G5":http://www.apple.com/imac/ (it comes with iSight built-in and many more). By the way, I like "Front Row":http://www.apple.com/imac/frontrow.html. Can I get that for my machines? I wonder.

!-/gallery/misc/ipod_new.png!

And the new "video-capable" "iPod":http://www.apple.com/ipod/ipod.html. My *prediction* was way off. :P

%(me)I predicted updates to the Powerbook line since it's been quite a while after last update. I guess it would be an Intel Powerbook next time. And I also predicted that there will be NO video iPod. Who would think that merely a month after "nano":http://www.apple.com/ipodnano/, a new iPod will show up?%

Oh, did I mention "iTunes 6":http://www.apple.com/itunes/? Forgive me but shouldn't 5.01 + .01 = 5.02? Well, fine fine .. 5.5. --"

*[ addition ]*

"Interesting observations":http://daringfireball.net/2005/10/brief_observations @ Daring Fireball regarding the new products.
